notes.registration_modeling_note: Nebraska registration and motor-vehicle taxes vary with MSRP, age, and county processing. Put your expected annual registration amount in each scenario's model_assumptions.annual_registration_usd after checking the DMV estimator or county quote.
notes.otd_modeling_note: Use quoted_out_the_door_price_usd as the source of truth whenever the dealer worksheet contains line items the notebook does not model explicitly.

sources.label: Nebraska Department of Revenue local sales tax rates effective April 1, 2026 to June 30, 2026
